title: Grain Market Dynamics: China Moving Away from the U.S.
section_path: Grain Market Dynamics: China Moving Away from the U.S.
section_path_text: Grain Market Dynamics: China Moving Away from the U.S.
summary:
Main
The U.S.-China trade war has fundamentally altered traditional dry bulk freight flows, particularly in grains, once a core employment base for Panamax and Supramax vessels on the U.S.-China route. This week, Allied Quantumsea Research reviews how these dynamics are unfolding as we enter the second half of the year. Macroeconomic Backdrop in China
From January to June 2025, China's economy faced mounting headwinds, with pressures intensifying through July and August.
